0.31.2.en: Dynamic list - "states" display now shows the configured state label/icon/color instead of the raw value
0.31.2.de: Dynamic list - "states" display now shows the configured state label/icon/color instead of the raw value
0.31.2.ru: Dynamic list - "states" display now shows the configured state label/icon/color instead of the raw value

0.31.1.en:
🌟 New feature: Status icon, state image and dimmer - active/on state can now be driven by a numeric condition (==, !=, >, >=, <, <=) instead of only boolean values
🌟 New feature: Static and dynamic lists - new "States" display maps each value to its own label, icon and color for multi-state sensors (e.g. window handle: closed/tilted/open), auto-filled from the datapoint's common.states

0.31.0.en: 🌟 New feature: Value & JSON-table widgets - `aura-file:` paths now resolve inside HTML ``, so images/icons from the ioBroker file system can be embedded the same way everywhere 🌟 New feature: JSON-table widget - new per-column width (px), text alignment and line-wrap options, plus an optional max-rows limit and click-to-sort column headers
0.31.0.de: 🌟 New feature: Value & JSON-table widgets - `aura-file:` paths now resolve inside HTML ``, so images/icons from the ioBroker file system can be embedded the same way everywhere 🌟 New feature: JSON-table widget - new per-column width (px), text alignment and line-wrap options, plus an optional max-rows limit and click-to-sort column headers

0.30.1.en: 🌟 New feature: Section menu - entries can now show markers (badges) and an optional aggregate count of how many widgets across the section's tabs currently have a badge

0.30.0.en:
🌟 New feature: Layouts - new "Sections" level: each layout can now hold several sections (the left-hand menu), each with its own tabs; export/import works per section, and a per-layout default section is used on open and for idle-return
🌟 New feature: Design - settings now cascade global → layout → section: theme, typography, grid, guidelines and tab bar can be overridden per section, and header, layout menu and idle-return per layout
🌟 New feature: Design - optional toggles to show the section menu and the tab bar even with a single entry (previously only shown from two)
🌟 New feature: Tab bar - can now be positioned at the bottom (footer) instead of the top
🌟 New feature: Layout menu - datapoint elements: pick the datapoint via the standard picker, and the template field supports HTML

0.25.5.en:
Custom layout - wrapped cell text now respects the configured alignment (e.g. centered titles stay centered across both lines)
JSON table / Value widget - http:// images now load on HTTPS pages (mobile); they are routed through the proxy instead of being blocked as mixed content

common.name: Frontend theme mode ('dark'|'light'|''); empty = no override
Admin theme mode ('dark'|'light'|''); empty = no override
Navigate to URL or tab slug
Admin PIN hash (FNV-1a, managed by frontend)
Latest log entry (JSON, updated on every system log)
